description_long: A vibrant magenta flower with a prominent yellow cluster of stamens sits atop a tall, green stem, surrounded by lush, linear grass blades. The flower's petals are broad, slightly pointed, and arranged in a radial pattern, overlapping at their bases to form a symmetrical whorl. The base of the plant is set in a circular patch of textured green ground, dotted with smooth, white stones and tufts of grass. Two elongated, lanceolate leaves extend from the stem, curving outward and downward. The flower's stem is thick and sturdy, anchoring the plant firmly in the ground. The overall scene evokes a naturalistic garden or park setting, with the flower as the central focal point.
description: A magenta flower with yellow stamens rises from a green stem, surrounded by grass, stones, and two lanceolate leaves on a circular patch of ground.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face of the magenta flower, yellow stamens, and the arrangement of grass and stones at the base.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the flower, revealing the curvature of the stem and the prominent lanceolate leaf extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the underside of the flower, the thick stem, and the dense grass and stones encircling the base.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the back of the flower and the second leaf, with the stem and ground details visible among the grass.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration, forming a symmetrical circle around the central cluster of stamens. Each petal slightly overlaps its neighbor at the base, creating a layered effect typical of many daisy-like flowers.
